title: LEGO Star Wars 75449 Siege of Mandalore Battle Pack - Action Toy w/ 2 Mandalorian & 2 Clone Trooper Minifigures plus a Speeder Bike and Blasters - Gift for 6+ Year Old Boys & Fans
features: MANDALORIAN TOY FOR 6+ YEAR OLD BOYS AND GIRLS – Play out the epic stories from Star Wars: The Clone Wars with this LEGO Star Wars Siege of Mandalore Battle Pack
4 LEGO STAR WARS MINIFIGURES – Equip the 2 Mandalorian Super Commandos with 2 jetpacks and 3 blaster pistols, and the 2 332nd Clone Troopers with a blaster and blaster rifle
SPEEDER BIKE TOY – Put a Mandalorian Super Commando in the driver’s seat of the LEGO Star Wars vehicle and the other at the back with the stud-shooting blaster
BUILT FOR ACTION PLAY – Place the Clone Troopers behind the barricade, stow ammo in its storage container, aim and activate the mounted stud shooter
STAR WARS GIFT FOR 6+ BOYS AND GIRLS – This building toy makes an great birthday gift for boys, girls and Star Wars: The Clone Wars fans aged 6 years old and up
BUILD BIGGER BATTLES – Look out for other LEGO Star Wars collectible Battle Pack sets (sold separately) to help kids expand their armies and play out even more fantasy adventures
ENHANCED, INTERACTIVE FUN – The LEGO Builder app helps your child build independently with tools that let them zoom in and rotate sets using 3D instructions, track progress and save them in one place
description: From the manufacturer Star Wars: The Clone Wars building set for kids Let kids play out the Siege of Mandalore, matching Mandalorian Super Commandos against Ahsoka versions of 332ⁿᵈ Clone Troopers. Fun builds for hours of battle play This set features quick builds and includes lots of accessories for action-packed play, including stud shooters, jetpacks and more. LEGO Star Wars Siege of Mandalore Battle Pack 4 LEGO Star Wars minifigures 2 Mandalorian Super Commandos and 2 332ⁿᵈ Clone Troopers. Star Wars speeder Drive the Commandos’ speeder and activate the stud-shooting blaster. Barricade Dodge incoming fire from the Clone Troopers’ mounted stud shooter. Includes interactive 3D building instructions Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Awesome treat for young Star Wars fans This collectable building toy makes a cool small gift for boys, girls and any S tar Wars: The Clone Wars fans aged 6 years old and over.

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
